heading: What to expect, roughly, by time of year
intro: These are general seasonal patterns, not guarantees — marine life sightings vary year to year.

values: Calmer seas, good visibility on the east side of atolls
Channel dives, easier conditions for newer divers
More plankton in the water, which draws in filter feeders
Manta ray season in Baa Atoll (Hanifaru Bay), typically peaking mid-year
Varies by atoll and specific site
Whale shark sightings around Dhigurah, Alifu Dhaalu Atoll
